_comment: CUSTOM MCP CHANNEL example: adds a dedicated .mcp_*.log file for all MCP traffic. MCP tools (mcp__<server>__<tool>) already route through the built-in 'mcp' category; this example captures that traffic to its own channel so it can be read in isolation. Enable subtype_routing.mcp to split per-server into .mcp-github_*.log, .mcp-todoai_*.log, etc.
